use_cases: Full-page contact form for business inquiries and customer support
Professional contact section for portfolio or business websites
User onboarding or feedback collection interface
ai_summary: A professional contact page component for React and Next.js applications, providing a complete contact form interface with standard Tailwind styling. Built with Radix UI primitives and shadcn/ui conventions for accessibility and consistency. Suitable for SaaS products, business websites, and portfolio pages requiring customer inquiry forms.
